title: Breaking into Impel Down: Turning Point

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Wait, wait, how did you get outside?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: get out...? I came in from outside.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait, wait!! Don't lie, you bastard!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And why aren't you in a cell!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: OH! Do you know where Ace is?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ACE... you mean fire fist ace....!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right, I want to save him!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I heard he'd been brought here recently.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And pick up the key for us?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Get outta here, bro, they'll kill you!!
